experiences.companyDescription: THIQAH is a Saudi company specializing in smart solutions and creative services. Established in 2012, it has partnered with over 100 strategic partners and developed more than 60 smart technical projects, serving over 10 million users in approximately 26 countries. Recognized as one of Asia's top workplaces for 2024.
experiences.description: Staff Automation & AI Engineer with deep expertise in building AI-driven testing solutions and leading the development of the Quality Mate platform.
responsibilities: Awarded Employee of the Year (2024) within the Quality Team for outstanding technical leadership, innovation in AI automation, and elevating team performance
Built and led the development of Quality Mate, an AI-powered automation platform integrated with Azure DevOps, Flowise, and GPT
Delivered full traceability from requirements to execution, automated test case generation, bug logging, and automation script creation
Researched, evaluated, and implemented new tools across AI/ML, low-code/no-code automation, and predictive analytics
Introduced AI-driven practices including self-healing scripts, AI locators, predictive test selection, and intelligent dashboards
Spearheaded gamification and engagement programs such as Test League, QC Tube, and Employee of the Quarter
Built and mentored cross-functional AI enablement teams, improving collaboration between developers and QA engineers
Represented the QC Automation team in company-wide innovation initiatives, presenting AI agent use cases and driving hackathons
Contributed to tool evaluations (Testsigma, Katalon, Mabl, Functionize, etc.), ensuring cost-effectiveness and long-term ROI
Enhanced automation maturity metrics by building dashboards (Power BI, Metabase, custom dashboards) to track coverage, defect detection rate, execution speed, and ROI
achievements: Employee of the Year (2024) - Quality Team
2nd Place Winner - Elm Hackathon (Dec 2025) with team Agent X
Organizer & Mentor - Thiqah Hackathon (Nov 2025)
Created Quality Mate platform - AI-powered automation solution
Launched Test League gamification program
Founded QC Tube knowledge hub

experiences.companyDescription: THIQAH is a Saudi company specializing in smart solutions and creative services.
experiences.description: Led automation framework development and team mentorship, significantly improving test efficiency and coverage.
responsibilities: Built and optimized automation frameworks (Robot Framework, Playwright, Cypress, Testim, Appium), reducing test cycle time by 30%
Designed and executed 2,000+ automated test cases, achieving 95% functional coverage
Implemented risk-based testing strategies, increasing coverage of high-priority features by 40%
Introduced new automation tools and frameworks, boosting testing efficiency by 20% and reducing costs by 10%
Mentored and led a team of 5 engineers, improving skill levels, collaboration, and overall team productivity by 20%
Partnered with cross-functional stakeholders to define automation strategies, reducing post-release defect leakage by 30%
Drove process improvement initiatives aligned with industry best practices, increasing testing accuracy by 15%
Promoted continuous learning by attending and sharing insights from industry conferences, reducing defect rates by 10%
Fostered a culture of growth and accountability, conducting quarterly performance evaluations improving employee satisfaction by 25%
achievements: Reduced test cycle time by 30%
Achieved 95% functional coverage with 2,000+ automated test cases
Reduced post-release defect leakage by 30%
Improved team productivity by 20%
